lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਖੀ ਬਿਰਖਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੜਾ ਸਚੁ ਚੁਗੈ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pankhee birakh suhaavarraa sach chugai gur bhaae |
lines.english: The soul-bird in the beautiful tree of the body pecks at Truth, with love for the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaasaa paaeaa har har naam samaae |1|
lines.english: She obtains her home within her own heart; she is absorbed into the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਹੈ ਉਡੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har ras peevai sehaj rahai uddai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: She drinks in the Sublime Essence of the Lord, and abides in intuitive ease; she does not fly around coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਤਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਚਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhaanai je chaleh taa anadin raacheh har naae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If you walk in harmony with the Guru's Will, you shall remain immersed in the Lord's Name, night and day. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re gur kee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: O mind, work to serve the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਨਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin gur mehal na jaapee naa amrit fal paeh |2|
lines.english: Without the Guru, they do not find the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, and they do not obtain the Ambrosial Fruit. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤਾ ਊਡਹਿ ਦੁਖ ਘਣੇ ਨਿਤ ਦਾਝਹਿ ਤੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jetaa aooddeh dukh ghane nit daajheh tai bilalaeh |
lines.english: The more they fly around, the more they suffer; they burn and cry out in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਖੀ ਬਿਰਖ ਸੁਹਾਵੜੇ ਊਡਹਿ ਚਹੁ ਦਿਸਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: pankhee birakh suhaavarre aooddeh chahu dis jaeh |
lines.english: The birds in the beautiful trees fly around in all four directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹਰੀਆਵਲਾ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh braham hareeaavalaa saachai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is like God's tree, always green, blessed with the Sublime Love of the True One, with intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਖਾ ਤੀਨਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੀਆ ਏਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saakhaa teen nivaareea ek sabad liv laae |
lines.english: He cuts off the three branches of the three qualities, and embraces love for the One Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਖਵਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: amrit fal har ek hai aape dee khavaae |3|
lines.english: The Lord alone is the Ambrosial Fruit; He Himself gives it to us to eat. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਊਭੇ ਸੁਕਿ ਗਏ ਨਾ ਫਲੁ ਤਿੰਨਾ ਛਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh aoobhe suk ge naa fal tinaa chhaau |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs stand there and dry up; they do not bear any fruit, and they do not provide any shade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਟੀਅਹਿ ਤੈ ਨਿਤ ਜਾਲੀਅਹਿ ਓਨਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਨਾਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: katteeeh tai nit jaaleeeh onaa sabad na naau |4|
lines.english: They are cut down and burnt each day; they have neither the Shabad, nor the Lord's Name. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿੰਨਾ ਪਾਸਿ ਨ ਬੈਸੀਐ ਓਨਾ ਘਰੁ ਨ ਗਿਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa paas na baiseeai onaa ghar na giraau |
lines.english: Don't even bother to sit near them-they have no home or village.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਫਿਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hukame karam kamaavane peiai kirat firaau |
lines.english: According to the Lord's Command, people perform their actions; they wander around, driven by the karma of their past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਣਾ ਜਹ ਭੇਜਹਿ ਤਹ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hukame darasan dekhanaa jeh bhejeh teh jaau |
lines.english: By the Lord's Command, they behold the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. Wherever He sends them, there they go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਬਪੁੜੇ ਭੂਲੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hukam na jaaneh bapurre bhoole fireh gavaar |
lines.english: The wretched fools do not know the Lord's Will; they wander around making mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hukame har har man vasai hukame sach samaau |5|
lines.english: By His Command, the Lord, Har, Har, abides within our minds; by His Command we merge in Truth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਨਾ ਸਚਿ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: antar saant na aavee naa sach lagai piaar |6|
lines.english: Inner peace does not come to them; they do not embrace love for the True Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਹੋਹਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth karam kamaavade nit nit hohi khuaar |
lines.english: They go about their business stubborn-mindedly; they are disgraced forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤੀ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: sachee bhagatee sach rate dar sachai sachiaar |
lines.english: Through true devotional worship, they are attuned to Truth; at the True Door, they are found to be true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖੀਆ ਮੁਹ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukheea muh sohane gur kai het piaar |
lines.english: Beautiful are the faces of the Gurmukhs, who bear love and affection for the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਏ ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਕੁਲ ਕਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aae se paravaan hai sabh kul kaa kareh udhaar |7|
lines.english: Blessed is their coming into being; they redeem all their ancestors. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਨਦਰੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਨਦਰੀ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh nadaree karam kamaavade nadaree baahar na koe |
lines.english: All do their deeds under the Lord's Glance of Grace; no one is beyond His Vision.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਸਚਾ ਤੈਸਾ ਹੀ ਕੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaisee nadar kar dekhai sachaa taisaa hee ko hoe |
lines.english: According to the Glance of Grace with which the True Lord beholds us, so do we become.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੮॥੩॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vaddaaeea karam paraapat hoe |8|3|20|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Glorious Greatness of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is received only by His Mercy. ||8||3||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam dhiaaeeai manamukh boojh na paae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs meditate on the Naam; the self-willed manmukhs do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee sukh paaeeai sahaje rahai samaae |1|
lines.english: Through intuitive understanding they are at peace, and through intuitive understanding they remain absorbed in the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re daasan daasaa hoe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, be the slaves of the Lord's slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa mukh aoojale har vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: The faces of the Gurmukhs are always radiant; the Lord has come to dwell within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਹੈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa gur bhagat hai viralaa paae koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Service to the Guru is worship of the Guru. How rare are those who obtain it! ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹਾਗੁ ਸੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਜੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa suhaag suhaaganee je chaleh satigur bhaae |
lines.english: The happy soul-bride is always with her Husband Lord, if she walks in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਨਾ ਵੀਛੁੜੈ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabad milee naa veechhurrai pir kai ank samaae |2|
lines.english: United with the Word of the Shabad, she shall not be separated again. She is immersed in the Lap of her Beloved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa pir nihachal paaeeai naa ohu marai na jaae |
lines.english: She attains her Eternal, Ever-stable Husband, who never dies or goes away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਤਿ ਊਜਲਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har niramal at aoojalaa bin gur paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: The Lord is Immaculate and Radiantly Bright; without the Guru, He cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਠੁ ਪੜੈ ਨਾ ਬੂਝਈ ਭੇਖੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paatth parrai naa boojhee bhekhee bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: He cannot be understood by reading scriptures; the deceitful pretenders are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu chukaaeaa guramatee sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is shed with intuitive ease, through the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramatee har sadaa paaeaa rasanaa har ras samaae |3|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the Lord is always found, and the tongue is permeated with the Sublime Essence of the Lord. ||3||
